zh.title:
> search("你是专业的数字货币交易分析师。请对 雪崩币/美元(AVAX/USD) 进行技术分析。

当前市场数据：
- 最新价格: 9.0035
- 24小时变化: -0.22%
- 高点/低点: 9.0221 / 8.9794
- RSI(14): N/A
- MACD: -0.077554590, Signal: N/A
- SMA(20): 9.059315

要求：
1. 第一行：完整的中文标题，格式："雪崩币/美元技术分析：[趋势描述]"
2. 然后空一行
3. 正文3-4段，每段60-80字，总共250-300字
4. 包含：趋势判断、技术指标解读、支撑/阻力位、交易建议
5. 使用专业术语但易于理解
6. 不要添加任何标签或额外说明

立即开始（第一行就是标题）：")
zh.content:
雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡

当前价格徘徊在 9 美元附近，较 SMA(20) 9.059 轻微下方整理，反映短期走势偏弱但无明显单边趋势。跌破均线区域显示多头动能不足，短线偏空震荡为主。价格盘整区间在 8.98–9.02 上下反复，趋势尚未形成明确方向。

技术指标方面，由于 RSI 数据缺失，难以判断超买超卖状态；但 MACD 为负值且未见明显向上交叉迹象，暗示动能偏弱。20 日均线作为中期参考位，价格在其下方震荡说明短期多头力量尚未恢复。若 MACD 直线延续下行，可加速跌势；反之若出现趋平或金叉，预示反弹契机。

支撑位关注近期低点 8.98 附近心理整数区域，其下方是 8.85 左右前低支撑；阻力位则先看 9.06 SMA 区域，其上是 9.15–9.20 前高阻力。如价格有效突破阻力并收复均线，多头情绪有望回升；若跌破支撑，将加剧空头压力。

交易建议上，保持谨慎偏中性策略。短线可在支撑附近寻找低多机会，止损设在支撑下方小幅空间；若价格突破 9.06–9.10 阻力区，可考虑轻仓做多，目标上看 9.20 及更高阻力。同时如失守 8.98，短线空头可跟进，止损设在反弹关键阻力上方，严格控制风险。整体以区间震荡思路操作为主。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis

> search("You are a professional cryptocurrency analyst. Use professional but accessible language\n4. No labels, no meta-commentary\n5. Start immediately with the content (no title needed)\n\nBegin:")

Avalanche (AVAX/USD) is currently trading around 9.00, slightly below its 20-period simple moving average near 9.06, suggesting mild short-term weakness. The price action within the 8.98–9.02 intraday range reflects a consolidation phase after a broader downtrend seen in recent weeks. When price trades under key moving averages, it typically signals limited bullish momentum. Longer-term averages remain significantly higher, reinforcing that the broader market structure still leans bearish unless a sustained breakout occurs. 

Momentum indicators also point to cautious sentiment. A negative MACD reading indicates that bearish momentum has not fully dissipated, even if downside pressure is gradually stabilizing. Meanwhile, broader technical studies show oscillators leaning neutral with occasionald RSI of 32.83. Stay up-to-date on market trends with our expert analysis.

Key price levels provide useful structure for short-term positioning. Immediate support appears near 8.93–8.98, aligning with recent pivot levels and the lower boundary of the current trading range. If this zone breaks, the next support cluster may form around 8.45–8.65, where previous technical models identified buyer interest. On the upside, resistance begins around 9.12 and strengthens near 9.30–9.39. A decisive break above these levels could shift short-term sentiment toward a recovery attempt. 

From a tactical perspective, range-based strategies may remain appropriate while AVAX trades between support and resistance. Key support levels cluster around $8.45-8.65, while resistance awaits at $9.12 and more significantly at $9.39.


From a tactical perspective, range-based strategies may remain appropriate while AVAX trades between support and resistance. Traders could consider cautious accumulation near the lower support zone with tight risk controls, targeting incremental rebounds toward the 9.30–9.40 area. Conversely, rejection near resistance may present short opportunities until momentum indicators turn positive. A confirmed move above roughly 10.00 would likely be required to establish a stronger bullish reversal narrative in the medium term.
